# cdp_datalake_config (Data Source)

Collects datalake information for re-creation purposes.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `crn` (String) The CRN of the datalake. Either this or the name must be specified - but not both -.
- `name` (String) The name of the datalake. Either this or the CRN must be specified - but not both -.

### Read-Only

- `aws` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws))
- `azure` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--azure))
- `gcp` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp))
